source: pred.gg public profile + own aggregate baselines

archetype.label: Closet Kira Main
archetype.receipt: 53.2% over 138 games on Kira — about 4.9 more wins per 100 games than the average Kira player. The wide pool hides a weapon.

entries.change: Move the jungle games to midlane

entries.receipt: 53.2% over 138 games on Kira vs 52.1% overall

entries.change: Queue midlane instead of the usual mix
entries.receipt: 53.0% there vs 52.1% overall, 159 games of evidence

ledger.note: wins per 100 games spent on each change; entries overlap and do not sum

leanInto.name: Kira
leanInto.engineCoachLine: Sim-optimal for sustained DPS: first spike lands around minute 12 (Viper), third item by minute 24. Take Demiurge: +20.3% on this kit’s main output at minute 15.

plan: Queue midlane as primary. It is Goldilocks324's best role at 53.0% over 159 games (overall is 52.1%). Set carry as secondary, not the other way around.
Comfort-hero rule for the climb: Kira. Compared with the average player on the same hero, Goldilocks324 wins about 4.9 more games per 100 on it.
Goldilocks324's champion pool is 16+ heroes wide and the top three are only 30% of the games. Gold-to-Platinum climbs are almost always pool-narrowing stories: aim for 70%+ of games on the top three.
The math: Goldilocks324 is at 646 VP; Platinum III starts at 900. The all-time peak is 922 — Platinum-level rating has been touched once already; this is a consistency problem, not a ceiling problem.
honesty: personal winrates are shrunk toward the player's own average (small heater samples do not count as mains)
field baselines are all-ranks aggregates from our current-patch match sample, not Gold-bracket-specific yet
winrate edges are observational; they say where the player wins, not why

insights.title: Goldilocks324 wins the long game
insights.finding: Past 32 minutes Goldilocks324 wins 64% vs 30% in short games. Scaling comps and patience fit; avoid coin-flip early all-ins.
insights.receipt: wins 3 of 10 short games vs 7 of 11 long ones, recent sample

insights.title: Cuban brings out Goldilocks324's best
insights.finding: Goldilocks324's record alongside Cuban Noobster is 56% over 205 ranked games — the strongest pairing in the stack. When only two of the squad queue, make it this pair.

insights.title: For the group chat
insights.finding: 3 pentakills in real 5v5s and a longest spree of 19 (plus 2 more in ARAM and brawls — the group chat can rule on whether those count). Goldilocks324 has receipts.

insights.title: Goldilocks324's lean, relative to the squad: vision work
insights.finding: Goldilocks324's profile sits mid-pack on most axes; the clearest lean is vision work at 1.3x the squad average. Steady is a style too — the lineup can build around predictability.

coachReasoning.assessment: Goldilocks324's recent wins came from monster farming — 9.4 CS/min on Steel against a 2.4 norm, 11.3 on Serath against 6.2 — while the carry losses show the leak: the 3/2/1 Kira game landed 568 damage per minute against a 938 norm. The lever is turning Kira from a quiet pick into the weapon it already is at 57.2% over 138 games.
plan: On Kira, drill the Mercy weave — basic attack, Mercy, basic attack — until the rotation is automatic; the 3/2/1 loss at 568 damage per minute against a 938 norm is a rotation gap, not a hero gap.
Play Kira around the minute-12 Viper spike and take Demiurge — +20.3% on the kit's main output at minute 15 — and avoid committing to fights before that spike is online.
On Drongo, hold Shrapnel Cannon's mid-air self-launch as the escape, not the opener — the 2/8/4 loss doubled the 4-death norm.
Carry the Steel and Serath farming discipline into carry games — 9.4 and 11.3 CS/min won those two; the recent carry losses didn't have that base.
Draft and play for the long game: 64% winrate past 32 minutes versus 30% in short games — skip coin-flip early all-ins on GRIM.exe and Drongo and let the scaling win.

insights.title: The closet Kira main
insights.finding: About 4.9 more wins per 100 games than the average Kira player, yet the top three heroes are only 30% of games — the weapon is under-used.

insights.title: Farm travels
insights.finding: Both recent wins beat their CS norms by a wide margin (9.4 vs 2.4 on Steel, 11.3 vs 6.2 on Serath); the carry losses lacked exactly that base.

insights.title: Built for late game
insights.finding: 64% past 32 minutes versus 30% in short games — patience is a measurable edge, so the squad should draft toward it.

insights.title: Duo lock
insights.finding: 56% over 205 ranked games alongside Cuban Noobster — the stack's proven pair when only two queue.

coachReasoningSource: in-session pred-scout-coach agent, grounded in the report + the player’s recent reviewed games; every number ground-checked, failing lines dropped
